prompt:
Subject: sunlight

Person/Expression: 20s female. Light ivory-beige white skin with a smooth texture containing a hint of pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, and collarbones. Delicate texture that preserves natural skin grain. The facial features have the atmosphere of a mature Japanese photographic model, avoiding any childishness. Expression is a soft smile directed at the camera. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural eye bags, light brown eyebrows, and sheer pink beige gloss lips. Small, clear catchlights in the pupils.

Clothing/Pose: Bright milk tea ash brown medium-long hair. Thin see-through bangs, layers along the face, and ends loosely curled inward. Soft airy feel, natural bundles, thin highlights, and a small amount of stray hairs. Clothing is an ivory ribbed sleeveless V-neck knit. Elegant and fits the body naturally, showing mature adult body shape and chest curves while remaining modest and refined. High-waisted beige shorts, white ribbed socks, and white sneakers without logos. Leaning against a bluish wall sitting on the floor, both knees up and legs extended toward the camera. The person's right hand is on the floor supporting the body, and the left hand rests lightly on one knee.

Background/Light: An outdoor corner reminiscent of a quiet building exterior. Behind is a slightly aged blue-gray painted wall, a white wall and thin green vines on the left, and cobblestones and small white gravel underfoot. Strong natural summer afternoon light enters from the upper left of the frame, creating bright highlights on hair, cheeks, shoulders, collarbones, knees, and sneakers. Shadows fall toward the lower right, making the blue background wall look slightly cool while the skin and clothes look warm.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, 3:4. Low-angle seated portrait. Camera is slightly lower than knee height, with the person placed near the center. Large white sneakers and legs in the foreground, with the face and upper body in the upper center of the frame. Natural wide-angle feel of around 35mm, perspective at the feet, focus on the face. Background is light and soft, preserving the texture of the wall.

Texture/Style: High-quality Japanese-style realistic photograph. Natural light portrait, clean summer air, soft film-like gradations. Skin is not overly polished, preserving natural pores and luster. Detailed depiction of knit ribbing, cobblestones, wall texture, and fine strands of hair. Avoid excessive HDR or plastic-like skin.

Negative: Minor, childish face, unnatural face, asymmetrical eyes, excessive skin correction, plastic skin, excessive chest emphasis, vulgar sexual expression, overexposure, transparent clothes, nipple exposure, underwear-like, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, distorted legs, deformed shoes, shadows inconsistent with light source, collapsing background, text, logo, watermark, excessive AI feel.
